description: Residential floor plan drawing showing a sample house layout with dimensions, room labels, symbols, notes, legend, north arrow, and sheet seal.
Architectural elevation sheet with South, East, North, and West Elevation drawings of a house, including roof, windows, porch, stairs, grade lines, ventilation, and construction detail callouts.
Technical architectural drawings showing two plan diagrams on one page: a Foundation Plan on top and a Roof Framing Plan below.
Main architectural cross-section drawing showing a garage and kitchen section with roof framing, insulation, walls, joists, posts, foundations, and labeled construction notes.
Top caption/label area for the main cross-section, including the drawing title 'Cross Section' and nearby annotations within the upper drawing.
Structural details panel containing eight smaller construction detail diagrams labeled 1 through 8.
